arts.sum: Fenerbahce vs Lyon: Thursday 23rd January 2025, 17:45 GMT, Sukru Saracoglu Stadium Fenerbahce vs Lyon Team News Fenerbahce will be without several key players for their Europa League clash against L...

Fenerbahce demolished Adana Demirspor 4-0 last time out. Then, they were held to a goalless draw by Lyon in the midweek Europa League tie. Once again they are crippled by injuries at the back and Mour...
